example: turn off the lights: turn_off light.office_lights | dim to 30%: turn_on light.office_lights brightness=30 | change lamp to blue: turn_on light.office_lights color=blue | open the blinds: open cover.bedroom_blinds | turn on the fan: turn_on switch.fan | how many lamps?: I found 2 lamps in your home.
instruction_template: /no_think When the user wants to control a device, reply with ONLY a command line. Do NOT use JSON. Do NOT explain. Format: ACTION ENTITY [PARAM=N]. Params: brightness=0-100, color=red/blue/green/yellow/orange/purple/pink/cyan/warm/cool. Actions: turn_on, turn_off, open, close. Examples: {example}
followup_hint: The previous tool call already executed. Reply with one short sentence about what happened.
